visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Weekend Screen Time (minutes)" — Saturday=35, Sunday=30, Monday=40, Tuesday=25. 4 categories. Horizontal layout.
visual_2: Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Horizontal. Axis along bottom, labeled 0–45 in 5s. All 4 bars empty.
guide: "This bar graph is horizontal—the bars go sideways. But look at the axis along the bottom. Same skip-counting by 5s. What comes after 35 on this axis?"
on_correct: "40. The axis counts by 5s: 5, 10, 15... 35, 40, 45. Same pattern, just running sideways."
